basis: CIF NWE / Dated Brent physical proxy
note: Easing with the broader market: on 22 June the U.S. and Iran agreed a 60-day roadmap and the JMIC cut its Hormuz threat level to moderate, so the war-risk premium that spiked around the 20 June closure declaration is coming back out. Brent has eased to about $79 and physical NWE differentials are softening with it; this estimate now tracks the calmer level. It remains an editorial proxy, not a traded quote — treat as indicative, and watch tanker-transit data over the rhetoric.
